Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0803 "PLUMBCRAZY-3000-0803" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $3000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Plumb Crazy!.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $3000 which does the following to allow the game to run correctly: 1. Sets $0B to $4C 2. Sets the execution address of CHROUT at $0326 to $0803
